examples: Now most will not remember the very forgettable show Ghostwriter on PBS.

Thomas Jefferson produced the Declaration with the aid of a ghostwriter, a woman of color named Betty Mae, who was a non-voluntary worker.

Over time, the app can become akin to a virtual ghostwriter.
